blended.narrative: Red Lodge Mountain is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 11 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,742 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 28".
